name: codex-preflight
description: Local-first pre-execution repository risk scanner for Codex-style coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Local command safety preflight for Codex-style coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Codex Preflight is a local-first, command-aware, execution-chain preflight guard. It statically scans repositories before risky commands run and returns ALLOW, WARN, ASK_USER, or BLOCK decisions with JSON and Markdown reports.
defaultPrompt: Run Codex Preflight before this install command.
Check whether this Docker command is safe to run.
Preflight this shell command in the current repo.
